zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Warenne於1287年6月15日出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親William de Warenne31歲，母親Joan de Vere33歲。她於1305年7月與Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1338年5月23日在她的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾豪頓 德斯豪曼德 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Warenne于1287年6月15日出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲William de Warenne31岁，母亲Joan de Vere33岁。她于1305年7月与Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1338年5月23日在她的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾豪頓 德斯豪曼德 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Warenne was born on 15 June 1287, in Arundel, Sussex, England, her father, William de Warenne, was 31 and her mother, Joan de Vere, was 33. She married Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel in July 1305, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 23 May 1338, in her hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Haughmond Abbey, Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Warenne est née le 15 juin 1287, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Warenne, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan de Vere, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel en juillet 1305, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 mai 1338, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Haughmond Abbey, Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Warenne am 15. Juni 1287 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Warenne 31 und ihre Mutter Joan de Vere 33. Sie hat im Juli 1305 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Mai 1338 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Haughmond Abbey, Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Warenne è nata il il 15 giugno 1287 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, sua padre, William de Warenne, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Joan de Vere, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel nel luglio 1305, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 23 maggio 1338, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Haughmond Abbey, Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Warenneが1287年6月15日にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父William de Warenneは31歳，母Joan de Vereは33歳であった。1305年7月にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルでEdmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1338年5月23日に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアハウトン デメスンハウモンド アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Warenne(이)가 1287년 6월 15일 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Warenne(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Vere(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1305년 7월 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1338년 5월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 하우그h턴 데메스니 하우그h몽 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Warenne nasceu em 15 de junho de 1287, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Warenne, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Vere, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel em julho de 1305, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de maio de 1338, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Haughmond Abbey, Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Haughmond Abbey, Haughmond Demesne, Upto: хомонд эбби, хотон демесн, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Warenne родилась 15 июня 1287 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Warenne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Vere, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel июль 1305 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 23 мая 1338 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности хомонд эбби, хотон демесн, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel en julio de 1305, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1338, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Haughmond Abbey, Haughton Demesne, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
